idea.title: Critter Survivor
idea.hook: Steer your hero, auto-blast a thickening swarm of cute critters, level up and draft powers to outlast the horde.
idea.prototype: Vampire-Survivors-style auto-shooter: hero auto-fires at the nearest enemy, player only moves (drag / virtual joystick); kills drop XP gems; level-up offers 1 of 3 upgrades (extra projectile, faster fire, bigger AoE, pierce, orbit blades, magnet, etc.); endless escalating swarm + new enemy types + a timed mini-boss; HP bar, swarmed = death; instant restart.
idea.why_novel: First true survivor auto-shooter in the portfolio (existing critter games 118_critter_keep / 129_critter_siege are keep/siege defense, not a move-only auto-shooter). The catch is the kill -> XP -> level-up -> build-your-power compounding loop against a thickening swarm.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Encroaching swarm of enemies (spatial, grows denser every wave) + a depleting HP budget. The run timer only counts UP as the score.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when hp <= 0 (critters deal contact damage on a per-critter 0.6s cooldown).

sources.title: Build a survivor auto-shooter (Vampire-Survivors-style)
sources.snippet: Hero auto-attacks nearest enemy; player only moves; endless escalating cute-critter swarms; kills drop XP; level-up picks 1 of 3 upgrades; new enemy types + mini-boss; swarmed = death; instant restart. THE CATCH = the addictive kill -> XP -> level-up -> build-your-power loop against a thickening swarm.

sources.title: Survivor.io / Vampire Survivors clone cluster
sources.snippet: The move-only auto-shooter is one of the most-installed mobile + web casual genres of the last two years: a proven 10-minute-loop 'catch' (auto-fire removes aiming friction; the level-up draft gives meaningful agency) with a high retention ceiling once a meta is layered on.

synthesizer_brief: Directly assigned by the factory leader: build ONE production-grade mobile-portrait-first vanilla-JS canvas survivor auto-shooter in Games/138_critter_survivor with the full pipeline (DESIGN.md, gf-lib audio + demo-hand tutorial + reachability hooks + autostart, screenshots, cover/icon, gates). The single judged bar is an addictive 10-minute core loop; no cross-session retention meta (that is the iterate job).

alternatives.title: Twin-stick survivor
alternatives.hook: Move with one thumb, aim-fire with the other against the swarm.
alternatives.why_novel: Rejected: a second input violates the move-only / one-control mandate and the mobile-portrait-first ergonomics. Auto-aim keeps time-to-first-fun under 15s.

alternatives.title: Weapon-evolution survivor
alternatives.hook: Combine two maxed weapons into an ultimate evolved form.
alternatives.why_novel: Held for an iteration pass: evolutions add depth but are a layer on top of the base draft; v0.1 ships the clean draft loop first.

alternatives.title: Arena-shrink survivor
alternatives.hook: A closing safe-zone forces the swarm tighter over time.
alternatives.why_novel: Rejected for v0.1: the encroaching swarm already provides spatial pressure; a shrinking arena risks cheap deaths that hurt the forgiving-failure goal.
